title: angelica decursiva
intro: Angelica decursiva, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Angelica decursiva include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as lowering blood pressure and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can also be used in cooking to add flavor and nutritional value.
